elements.text:
You are meeting with your professor. To make it on-time, you just walked up two flights of stairs quickly, and feel your heart beating very rapidly.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: Am I having a heart attack?
It's scary to feel my heart beating fast, but I know that it will be over soon.
My professor might notice how out of breath I am, and it's okay if they do.
I made it up those stairs really quickly.
I am excited for the meeting.
